productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Pumps Beige Peep Toes
description: Celebrate and enhance your feminity with these absolutely stunning and comfortable heeled shoe from catwalk. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair is perfect for party wear Heel: 3& rdquo Upper Slip-on style sandal with a synthetic patent leather upper, back heel cup and forefoot cap with a peep toe for absolute comfort and style Buckle design on the forefoot for enhanced style Synthetic leather strip on the footbed for enhanced comfort Outsole Non-slip outsole with grooves on the forefoot and heel patch,for absolute grip even on smooth surfaces Brand badge on the outsole Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
